subject: math
activity_templates: A 1st-grade subtraction-within-20 worksheet. 8 subtraction problems in big clear numbers (e.g. '15 - 7 = __'). Header reads 'Subtraction Practice'. {{character}} waves in the top corner.
A take-away picture subtraction worksheet. Four problems showing a group of cute cartoon objects with some crossed out, and a blank for the answer. {{character}} smiles next to the first problem.
A subtraction number-line worksheet. A number line 0-20 at the top; 4 problems below asking the child to hop backwards along the line to solve. {{character}} hops backwards on the line.
A subtraction word-problem worksheet with 4 short kid-friendly word problems (e.g. 'I had 12 cookies and ate 4. How many are left?') with answer boxes. {{character}} holds a pencil.
